news.title:
Astral Ltd faces GST order over excess Input Tax Credit claimed from Jul '17 to Mar '21.
Tax payable is 26.8M with 2.68M interest/penalty; company plans to challenge.
news.summary:
Astral Ltd faces GST order over excess Input Tax Credit claimed from Jul '17 to Mar '21.
Tax payable is 26.8M with 2.68M interest/penalty; company plans to challenge.

news.title:
Astral faces potential exclusion from MSCI indices, with a price impact of $161M (Rs 14.7B).
This MSCI February rejig outcome could significantly influence Astral's stock performance.
news.summary:
Astral faces potential exclusion from MSCI indices, with a price impact of $161M (Rs 14.7B).
This MSCI February rejig outcome could significantly influence Astral's stock performance.

news.title:
PVC price rebound in Q4FY26 boosts plastic pipe makers; prices up by ₹10-12/kg aiding inventory restocking.
Astral, Supreme Industries show YoY volume growth; other stocks fell 12-25% in 6 months despite upbeat Q4 outlook.
news.summary:
PVC price rebound in Q4FY26 boosts plastic pipe makers; prices up by ₹10-12/kg aiding inventory restocking.
Astral, Supreme Industries show YoY volume growth; other stocks fell 12-25% in 6 months despite upbeat Q4 outlook.

news.title: Astral expects realizations to improve from Q4 onwards, as per CNBC TV18.
news.summary: Astral expects realizations to improve from Q4 onwards, as per CNBC TV18.

news.title: Astral anticipates a robust Q4 driven by better demand and increasing margins.
news.summary: Astral anticipates a robust Q4 driven by better demand and increasing margins.

news.title:
Astral's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹2.4B from ₹2.19B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 15.4% from 15.7% YoY.
news.summary:
Astral's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹2.4B from ₹2.19B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 15.4% from 15.7% YoY.

news.title:
Astral Ltd's Q3 revenue rose 10.3%, nine-month revenue up 7.9% YoY.
Plumbing volumes grew 17%, paints and adhesives grew 15% and 21%. Kanpur plant operational.
news.summary:
Astral Ltd's Q3 revenue rose 10.3%, nine-month revenue up 7.9% YoY.
Plumbing volumes grew 17%, paints and adhesives grew 15% and 21%. Kanpur plant operational.

news.title: Astral's co-promoter group purchased 36,000 shares via open market on Dec 30.
news.summary: Astral's co-promoter group purchased 36,000 shares via open market on Dec 30.

news.title:
Plastic pipe makers face earnings pressure due to weak demand, cheap PVC imports, and policy delays on ADD and BIS rules.
Supreme, Astral, and Finolex are better placed, while Prince and Apollo Pipes may struggle with capacity additions and price wars.
news.summary:
Plastic pipe makers face earnings pressure due to weak demand, cheap PVC imports, and policy delays on ADD and BIS rules.
Supreme, Astral, and Finolex are better placed, while Prince and Apollo Pipes may struggle with capacity additions and price wars.

news.title: Astral expects to achieve double-digit revenue growth for FY26.
news.summary: Astral expects to achieve double-digit revenue growth for FY26.

news.title:
Astral Ltd to virtually join J.P. Morgan India Emerging Opportunities Forum on 26th Nov 2025.
Event includes interactions with major investors like Kotak Mahindra AMC, Franklin Templeton, and BNP Paribas.
news.summary:
Astral Ltd to virtually join J.P. Morgan India Emerging Opportunities Forum on 26th Nov 2025.
Event includes interactions with major investors like Kotak Mahindra AMC, Franklin Templeton, and BNP Paribas.

news.title:
Astral Ltd released its Nov 6, 2025 earnings call transcript on its website.
The transcript offers detailed insights into recent financial performance for investors.
news.summary:
Astral Ltd released its Nov 6, 2025 earnings call transcript on its website.

news.title:
Last day to buy shares of Garden Reach, Nuvama, Metropolis, Chambal Fertilisers, Saregama, Siyaram, and Astral for dividend eligibility is Nov. 10.
Dividends announced: Garden Reach Rs 5.75, Nuvama Rs 70, Metropolis Rs 4, Chambal Rs 5, Saregama Rs 4.50, Siyaram Rs 4, Astral Rs 1.50 per share.
news.summary:
Last day to buy shares of Garden Reach, Nuvama, Metropolis, Chambal Fertilisers, Saregama, Siyaram, and Astral for dividend eligibility is Nov. 10.
Dividends announced: Garden Reach Rs 5.75, Nuvama Rs 70, Metropolis Rs 4, Chambal Rs 5, Saregama Rs 4.50, Siyaram Rs 4, Astral Rs 1.50 per share.

news.title:
HDFC Securities rates LIC, Aurobindo Pharma, Star Cement, Metropolis, Godrej Properties, Birlasoft as 'Add'; Symphony, Astral as 'Buy'.
LIC's APE growth at 3% YoY; Mankind Pharma's Ebitda down 6% vs. estimates; Aurobindo Pharma's Ebitda up 7% YoY.
news.summary:
HDFC Securities rates LIC, Aurobindo Pharma, Star Cement, Metropolis, Godrej Properties, Birlasoft as 'Add'; Symphony, Astral as 'Buy'.
LIC's APE growth at 3% YoY; Mankind Pharma's Ebitda down 6% vs. estimates; Aurobindo Pharma's Ebitda up 7% YoY.

news.title:
LIC reduced stakes in NMDC, Coforge, Apollo Hospitals, and Eicher Motors below 1% in Q2 FY2025.
LIC raised stakes in BSE, Yes Bank, Cipla, Dr. Reddy's, KPIT Tech, Tata Elxsi, Astral, Voltas, Colgate in Q2 FY2025.
news.summary:
LIC reduced stakes in NMDC, Coforge, Apollo Hospitals, and Eicher Motors below 1% in Q2 FY2025.
LIC raised stakes in BSE, Yes Bank, Cipla, Dr. Reddy's, KPIT Tech, Tata Elxsi, Astral, Voltas, Colgate in Q2 FY2025.

news.title:
Astral Ltd acquired 80% shares of Nexelon Chem Pvt Ltd, making it a subsidiary.
Acquisition completed via share purchase agreement; announced earlier on 11 Aug 2025.
news.summary:
Astral Ltd acquired 80% shares of Nexelon Chem Pvt Ltd, making it a subsidiary.
Acquisition completed via share purchase agreement; announced earlier on 11 Aug 2025.

news.title:
Astral Ltd reports Q2 FY26 plumbing volume up 20.6% YoY, EBITDA up 22.5% YoY.
Revenue from operations rose 15.1% YoY; Rs. 1.50/share interim dividend declared.
news.summary:
Astral Ltd reports Q2 FY26 plumbing volume up 20.6% YoY, EBITDA up 22.5% YoY.
Revenue from operations rose 15.1% YoY; Rs. 1.50/share interim dividend declared.

news.title:
ASTRAL reports Q2 net profit of ₹1.35B, up from ₹1.18B YoY.
Revenue rose to ₹15.77B, EBITDA grew to ₹2.57B with margin improving to 16.3%.
news.summary:
ASTRAL reports Q2 net profit of ₹1.35B, up from ₹1.18B YoY.
Revenue rose to ₹15.77B, EBITDA grew to ₹2.57B with margin improving to 16.3%.

news.title:
Astral Ltd schedules an earnings call on 6th Nov 2025 at 5 PM to discuss 2QFY26 and 1HFY26 results.
Management representatives include Chairman Sandeep Engineer, Executive Directors Kairav Engineer and Hiranand Savlani.
news.summary:
Astral Ltd schedules an earnings call on 6th Nov 2025 at 5 PM to discuss 2QFY26 and 1HFY26 results.
Management representatives include Chairman Sandeep Engineer, Executive Directors Kairav Engineer and Hiranand Savlani.
